item.text: If the visual layout is ever an issue for accessibility or preference, the user must be provided with an equivalent alternative text-only page.

If the visual layout is ever an issue for accessibility or preference, alternatively, the user should be provided with an equivalent alternative text-only page. On top of that, to help users find what they need, we definitely need a separate navigation overview, such as a site map, showing the structure of the site in an overview form.

item.text: A dedicated Help Module must offer detailed context-sensitive help material for all the possible actions and scenarios the user might encounter.

grounded_items.best_supporting_span: When someone gets stuck, we really need a dedicated Help Module.
grounded_items.best_supporting_context: When someone gets stuck, we really need a dedicated Help Module. It has to offer detailed context-sensitive help material for all the possible actions and scenarios they might encounter.

item.text: Context-sensitive help material must be available across all user interfaces in the application so users are never left guessing.

And this needs to be available across all user interfaces in the application, so they are never left guessing.

item.text: The system must offer alternative access paths for navigating to a specific unit of content.

To do that effectively, we should be offering alternative access paths for navigating to a specific unit of content, which will really help support those different navigation strategies.

item.text: The system must allow a user to be a member of more than one group.

grounded_items.best_supporting_context: More broadly, we need solid role-based control for the functionality within the system to manage all these permissions. And since our staff often wear multiple hats, it's crucial that we allow a user to be a member of more than one group.

item.text: The system must provide the ability to export audit trails for specified cases, but doing so must happen without affecting the audit trail stored by the System.

Finally, we will sometimes need to pull this data out for review, so we need the ability to export audit trails for specified cases, but doing so must happen without affecting the audit trail stored by the System.

item.text: Frequently-executed system transactions must be designed so they can be completed with a small number of interactions.

item.text: End User and Administrator functions must be easy to use and intuitive throughout.

item.text: The user interfaces must ensure input device independence and be designed to allow activation of controls by a variety of input devices, not just a standard mouse.

item.text: The system must maintain the audit trail for as long as required, which means keeping it at least for the life of the case to which it refers.
